message:
fix(connectors): kubernetes RateLimited error mapping, AWS retry-after dead code

Kubernetes mapped RateLimited to FcpError::External instead of
FcpError::RateLimited, preventing framework rate-limit backoff.

AWS check_error_status() handled 429/503 with hardcoded 30s retry before
handle_json_response() could parse the Retry-After header, making the
header parsing dead code. Moved 429/503 handling out of check_error_status
so both handle_json_response and s3_get_object parse the actual header.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
